summary: MLBN 24/7 Live Linear playback starts at live point
description:
GIVEN a user is entitled for MLBN
AND the user is logged in

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a 24/7 Live Linear stream to watch
steps.result:
THEN the video player goes full screen
AND the content title is displayed left justified above the scrubber bar
AND playback starts at the live point
AND the playhead displays far right on the scrubber bar
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
